chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 344 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge For non-prosecution 10.11.2022 Mr. Irfan Ali Soomro, Advocate for the petitioner <><><><>..<><><><> Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press this petition; however, states that the petitioner shall approach for the redressal of his grievance to the Electric Inspector. Accordingly, the instant petition stand dismissed as not pressed, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the concerned authority for redressal of his grievance in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
